since_last: 79% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.02%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 79% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -0.18% · Gold -2.03% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 79% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.02%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.02%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +8.52%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.52%, MRVL +6.30%, MU +5.74%, LRCX +5.46%, KLAC +4.88%. Laggards: IBM -3.82%, SPCX -2.42%, INTU -1.16%, WDAY -0.92%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.42% at $187.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
